title: MacBook Air M4 for development: 1 year review
abstract: Tired of clunky laptops? Give the MacBook Air M4 for development a try! Lightweight and speedy, it's like giving your coding work wings. After a year, I can only say: this machine is always ready to rip into code with amazing performance. Dive in and make coding less of a chore!
abstract_zh: 你还在为笨重的笔记本电脑烦恼吗？来试试这款MacBook Air M4 for development吧！它轻若鸿毛，快如闪电，简直就像给你的开发工作插上了翅膀。用了一年后，只能说：这台机器真是一言不合就开撕代码，性能杠杠的！赶紧体验一下吧，让编程不再是苦差事！
